title: Optimizer UI & Observability Overhaul (P1-P5)
description: Full overhaul of the Optimizer dashboard surface per spec docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-07-optimizer-ui-overhaul-design.md. Five independently-shippable phases: P1 signs-of-life (session entity, phase events, replay), P2 evidence (findings/gate records, experiment researcher page), P3 charts (uplot improvement/spend/outcome), P4 controls (pause/resume/continuous modes), P5 scheduling. Root causes: deriveCycleState() loses state on refresh; no phase-level events between mutation_proposed and mutation_gated; findings/gate numbers not persisted; no charts; scheduling hardcoded.
close_reason: All 5 phases merged to main (P1 #843, P2 #846, P3 #847, P4 #848, P5 #849)

title: Review and merge PR 841

title: Optimizer: run continuously until stopped or limits hit
description: Run Optimizer currently runs exactly one cycle and stops. Make it loop continuously, re-launching run_cycle after each completes. Add stop conditions: Stop button, max iterations, total cumulative budget. Backend: loop in start_cycle handler. Frontend: add iterations + budget inputs, show Stop button while running.
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix Ollama 404: auto-append /v1 for ProviderKind::Ollama in LLM dispatch
description: Both the chat rail and eval review hit 404 when calling Ollama because the OpenAI-compat dispatcher appends /chat/completions to the base_url, but Ollama's endpoint is at /v1/chat/completions. Need to auto-normalize Ollama provider base_url to include /v1.
close_reason: Closed

Turn these into actionable improvements organized by surface (CLI, WEBUI, SKILLS, HARNESS), and turn the control tower evaluation spec (2026-06-07-control-tower-dashboard-evaluation.md) into an actionable QA list with evidence required per item.

close_reason: Implemented: SafetyPauseBanner component + tests, mounted in HomeRoute. Spec+quality reviewed.

title: Control Tower: cockpit home page overhaul (3 slices)
description:
Overhaul the dashboard home page from a setup-completeness panel to an operator cockpit. Based on approved spec docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-07-control-tower-dashboard-evaluation.md (passed 3-reviewer adversarial gate 2026-06-07).

Why this issue exists: The current home page surfaces config nags and recent runs. The design spec (2026-05-10) and post-optimizer reality (2026-06-07) both require an operations re-entry panel that surfaces: what's making money, what's in motion, what needs attention, and what the Optimizer did overnight. The 'LIVE strategy' surface (real money vs paper evals) is explicitly missing.

3-slice structure (sequential, slice 2 depends on optimizer-ui-overhaul P1-P5 landing):
- Slice 1 (frontend-only): Cockpit home — Active tasks, critical findings, per-strategy outcomes, safety banner, live strategies section, nag strip demotion, remove count cards.
- Slice 2 (new backend): Optimizer digest strip + agent-runs list endpoint + active-cycle endpoint + live strategies list page (/live route).
- Slice 3 (backend-first): Verified outcomes header with capital-risk strip (PnL data path via live SSE per operator decision 2026-06-07), time-window filters, deploy-readiness check.

What needs to be done: Implement per the spec's §7.3 tracer slices, adding a dedicated live strategy view (separate from paper evals) as specified by operator on 2026-06-07.

title: Fix HOLD+exit_reason action display: show actual closing action
description: When exit_reason is present (stop_loss, take_profit, etc.) and the model said HOLD, the action column should show the actual closing action (SELL for long close, CLOSE for short cover) not HOLD. Also: short entries should show SHORT not SELL.
close_reason: Closed

title: Remove No-op filter pill from Decisions table
description: The FILTERED/No-op pill in the decisions table action filter row should be removed. Filtered rows aren't real decisions and the pill adds clutter.

title: Remove agent role input from strategy composer UI
description: The 'New agent role' text field gates the Create-and-attach button in the strategy authoring page. Remove the field entirely; auto-generate the role from the agent name (kebab-case). Also remove the role display from attached-agent rows since it adds noise.
close_reason: Closed

title: Implement Signal drop-down menu system
description: Build the Signal menu system as shown in the Signal Menus design PDF. The design specifies a unified dropdown surface for action menus (⋯ overflow), sort selects, model pickers, and checkbox filters. Currently the app has no floating dropdown components — the strategy row uses plain text buttons (Clone / Inspector →), the sort control uses a native <select>, and the model picker is a native <select>. All need upgrading to the new Signal-styled custom dropdowns.
close_reason: Implemented in PR #837 (feat/signal-menus): SignalMenu.tsx primitive with 4 variants, icon additions, strategies ⋯ action menu, ListToolbar sort/filter upgrade to custom dropdowns, ModelPickerDropdown

title: Align Optimizer and ChatRail model pickers

close_reason: completed

title: Fix deploy-image cleanup for Docker ps format compatibility
description: During a local-image deployment on 2026-06-06, scripts/deploy-image.sh loaded the new image successfully but its post-load cleanup emitted: failed to execute template at <.ImageID>: can't evaluate field ImageID in type *formatter.ContainerContext. The script then attempted to remove xvision:deploy-beaf0e6 and Docker correctly refused because xvnej-app still referenced the old image. The cleanup logic should use a Docker CLI-compatible way to detect container image IDs across installed Docker versions before selecting old xvision tags for removal.
acceptance_criteria: Post-load cleanup identifies containers referencing the prior image without using unsupported docker ps template fields; cleanup skips tags still referenced by any container; deploy-image.sh completes without cleanup template errors on root@100.120.48.1's Docker version.

title: QA: Move Strategies back button above list
description: Strategy page side bar layout reduces page width. Move the Strategies back button above the list rather than keeping it in the side bar layout.
close_reason: Implemented and verified in worktree codex/qa-list
